---
title: "The Very Rev. Edward Hayes Plumptre"
---

## The Very Rev. Edward Hayes Plumptre

**Dates:** (1821-1891)

### Description

chaplain of King’s College, London

### Biography

professor at Queen's College, Harley St; he became Dean of Wells in 1881;  he was the brother-in-law of F.D. Maurice [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from March 27th 1866
- Letter from March 19th [1866]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
